name: trade_policy_workplace_injury_spike_oakline_jus_mer
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Trade Policy, the situation tagged internally around trade policy workplace injury spike oakline jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The organization’s past incidents make justice feel morally loud today, while mercy is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Mateo Patel
agents.identity: I am Mateo Patel, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Trade Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Elena Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Elena Vasquez, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Trade Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of mercy.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of justice even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Mateo Patel must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Mateo Patel do?
